{{CargoRelic
|name=Monday Star
|class_id=20174
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Fortune Law 2: Monday marks the beginning of work. Always maintain optimism, attentiveness, and caution. May the goddess of luck be with you always!
|fame=16
|art=31
|fth=14
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail ATK +1<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss2=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail ATK +2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss3=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail ATK +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss4=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail ATK +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss7=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail ATK +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800<br> (Awakened)
}}
